title: DAVV Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: DAVV Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: DAVV Time Table 2026 out for BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, BCA, BJMC, BSW and other UG courses under NEP. Check revised exam notifications and download PDF at dauniv.ac.in.

content.text: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV) has officially released the DAVV Time Table 2026 for various undergraduate courses including BA, B.Sc, B.Com, BBA, BCA, BJMC, BSW and more under NEP. Students can now access the revised exam notifications and schedules for the 2026 examinations on the official website – https://www.dauniv.ac.in/ug-time-table. The notifications cover regular, private, ex-students and supplementary exams.

These revised schedules help students prepare effectively for their upcoming theory and practical examinations. Download the official PDF notifications using your course details and keep a printed copy for reference.
Students are advised to verify all details carefully from the official notifications and contact the university in case of any discrepancy.

Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya has issued multiple revised exam notifications for UG courses in 2026. These cover Art, Commerce, Science, Management and other streams under the NEP pattern for I Year, II Year, III Year and IV Year students.

rows: B.Sc., B.H.Sc., B.Com., B.A., BBA, BCA, BJMC, BSW (NEP) II Year

content.text: DAVV has released detailed revised exam notifications containing subject-wise schedules for different undergraduate programs. Students can find exact exam dates, timings, and paper titles in the respective PDF notifications for their course and year. The schedules primarily cover theory examinations for regular, private and ex-students under NEP 2026.
Refer to the official UG Time Table page for the complete subject-wise dates as they vary by program and year. Always cross-check the latest revised notification for any updates.

rows: Multiple revised notifications for I, II, III & IV Year
Partial revised and full notifications for all years
Combined revised notifications with other streams

sections.heading: How to Download DAVV Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the DAVV Time Table 2026 from the official university website. The process is simple and requires only a stable internet connection.

items: Visit the official DAVV website and navigate to the UG Time Table section at https://www.dauniv.ac.in/ug-time-table.
Locate your course group such as Art, Commerce or Science and find the relevant revised exam notification for your year and program.
Click on the desired PDF link corresponding to your course (e.g., B.A. NEP I Year or B.Com II Year).
The notification will open in a new tab. Review the exam dates, timings, and instructions carefully.
Download the PDF file to your device for easy access.
Take a printout of the timetable and save a digital copy on your phone for quick reference during preparation.

content.text: Students should check the official timetable carefully and keep a copy handy for effective exam preparation. Regularly visit the university portal for any last-minute revisions.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in DAVV Time Table 2026

content.text: The official DAVV Time Table 2026 notifications contain all essential information required for students appearing in the examinations. These details help candidates plan their studies and appear confidently.

items: Course name, year and semester details under NEP
Exam type (Regular, Private, Ex-student, Supplementary/ATKT)
Subject-wise exam dates and days
Examination timings (morning or afternoon sessions)
Paper titles and codes
Important instructions for candidates
Revised notification dates and validity
Practical or viva schedules (where applicable).
